file_insights.changes: Added dynamic WatchPaths discovery and XML generation
key_sections: Lines 36-59: Filesystem scanning for team-* directories and watch_subdir selection
Lines 61-64: XML formatting of WatchPaths array items

file_insights.changes: Added detailed progress documentation for subtasks 1-2 and 1-3
file_insights.completeness: comprehensive with examples and verification steps

patterns_discovered.description: watch_subdir determined by subcommand: 'pending' for dispatcher, 'done' for merge-gate
patterns_discovered.benefit: Single function handles multiple launchd services with different monitoring needs

patterns_discovered.description: Team directories scanned at plist generation time using fs::read_dir with flatten() error handling
patterns_discovered.benefit: No hardcoded team list; automatically discovers new team-* directories

patterns_discovered.description: file_name().into_string() used to safely convert OsString with error handling
patterns_discovered.benefit: Handles non-UTF8 filenames gracefully by skipping them

patterns_discovered.description: Vec<PathBuf> converted to formatted XML strings with proper indentation and newlines
patterns_discovered.benefit: Readable plist output with consistent formatting

gotchas_discovered.description: team_watch.exists() checked at plist generation time; paths could be deleted before launchd uses plist
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Non-critical since launchd will simply ignore non-existent paths, but could produce orphaned entries

gotchas_discovered.description: Discovery logic assumes team directories start with 'team-' prefix
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Convention documented in MEMORY.md; consider adding validation or documentation in code comments

gotchas_discovered.description: fs::read_dir() called synchronously; performance impact if many team directories or slow filesystem
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Acceptable for plist generation (infrequent operation); not in hot path

gotchas_discovered.description: Uses flatten() to silently ignore permission errors; could mask real permission problems
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Acceptable for discovery; failed entries simply omitted from watch paths

verification: Code compiles without errors or warnings
approach_outcome.integration: Builds on subtask-1-2 (WatchPaths replacement); prepares for phase-2-verification

recommendations.recommendation: Add debug logging to track which team directories are included in generated WatchPaths
recommendations.rationale: Helps operators verify correct launchd configuration and diagnose missing team directories

recommendations.recommendation: Add code comment documenting the 'team-' naming convention requirement
recommendations.rationale: Makes assumption explicit for future maintainers; reduces debugging time if convention violated

recommendations.recommendation: Consider caching plist generation if filesystem scanning becomes bottleneck
recommendations.rationale: Currently acceptable; only matters if team directory count grows significantly

recommendations.recommendation: Add validation that watch_paths are readable at plist generation time
recommendations.rationale: Would catch permission issues early rather than silently failing at runtime

recommendations.recommendation: Create test case with multiple team directories to verify WatchPaths XML generation
recommendations.rationale: Ensures dynamic discovery works correctly; validates XML formatting
